experience.description: Access the player's Quest Log: review past campaigns, guild ranks held, and legendary achievements unlocked across multiple realms

kubikware.description: Collaborated within a 7-person cross-functional team to enhance a high-scale toll management platform. I developed scalable Web and API solutions for real-time fleet monitoring and automated payments. Utilizing Test-Driven Development and modern architectural patterns, I optimized system performance, refactored legacy code, and reduced bugs, while actively contributing to quarterly strategic roadmap planning.
kubikware.tooltip: Tech Stack: React, Typescript, .NET, SQL Server, TDD, REST APIs, Azure.

nextira.description: Architected and deployed scalable AWS cloud infrastructures using Terraform and Packer to transition creative studios from on-premise environments. I managed end-to-end migrations of rendering pipelines using Thinkbox Deadline and automated resource provisioning. Additionally, I developed Python automation scripts and React frontend components to enhance platform management, ensuring high availability and smooth client onboarding.
nextira.tooltip: Tech Stack: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, VPC), Terraform, Packer, Python, React, Linux, AWS Thinkbox Deadline.

perficient.description: Architected and maintained a TypeScript-based Load Management SPA and a freight shipper portal for a Kansas City client. I developed production-ready frontend features utilizing the modern React ecosystem, Redux Toolkit, and Material UI, while leveraging C# / Node.js to implement robust service APIs and business logic that ensured system correctness, maintainability, and seamless workflow support.
perficient.tooltip: Tech Stack: AWS, .NET 10, React, React Native, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Node.js.

overview.about_me: A dedicated and highly responsible Full Stack Developer with a proven track record of mastering complex technologies rapidly. I am committed to delivering high-impact results from day one, consistently aligning technical execution with team goals and the organization’s quality standards.

str.name: STR
str.description: Resilience & Heavy Lifting: This stat reflects pure discipline. It represents both the consistency of a 3-day-a-week progressive overload routine in the gym, and the mental muscle required to tackle heavy code refactoring or drag legacy systems into the modern era.

dex.name: DEX
dex.description: Speed & Adaptability: Grants passive mastery over Agile/Scrum workflows and Test-Driven Development (TDD). Enables swift navigation through fast-paced React and TypeScript ecosystems.

int.name: INT
int.description: Architecture & Logic: Forged by an Information Systems Engineering degree. Unlocks advanced backend construction and cloud architecture using .NET, Node.js, and AWS (Lambda, S3).

char.name: CHAR
char.description: Communication & Teamwork: Unlocks strong professional English capabilities. Applies a passive buff to teamwork, creating an easygoing and highly collaborative dynamic with international clients and cross-functional teams.

vit.name: VIT
vit.description: Uptime & Endurance: Empowers Clean Code practices to guarantee high uptime, maintainability, and bug-resistant releases that withstand heavy server loads and stand the test of time.
